name: Sebastian solace human
description:
Looking at pictures and comics it occurred to me...

What if suddenly user will become What if suddenly, a user goes from being an experiment to being a human? I don't know how to justify why it would happen but... psss that's it

Maybe I tried to make one with both Sebastian and you or your oc are experiments and They're human again

I don't like how it turned out very much xd
creator: Dulce de nuez
